LAW AND MOTION 302, ATTORNEY JOEL BIERER'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF GWEN KAUFFMAN IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM AUGUST 29, 2016 TO FEBRUARY 27, 2017 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 206. ORDER SIGNED. ALL DATES ARE TRIGGERED OFF OF THE NEW TRIAL DATE, NOT THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE. MR. BIERER IS TO INFORM MR. KEEFE OF THE NEW TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Continued To Feb-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joel Bierer of Law Offices of Joel D. Bierer telephone number 415-383-5666 for and with Plaintiff Gwen Kaufmann.
Erin Keefe of Blaxter Blackman LLP telephone number 415-500-7700 for Defendant Whole Foods Market California, Inc.

Mr. Keefe stated that he does not object to a continuance of the trial date. Mr. Bierer and Ms. Kaufman discussed the matter off the record. ATTORNEY JOEL BIERER'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF GWEN KAUFFMAN is granted. Order signed. The trial date is continued from August 29, 2016 to February 27, 2017 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 206. Order signed. All dates are triggered off of the new trial date, not the original trial date. Mr. Bierer is to inform Mr. Keefe of the new trial date.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
